status_legend.valid: URL 已确认存在并与目标院系相关；可在抓取时直接读取
status_legend.requires_js: 页面需要 JS 渲染才能获取完整教师/研究方向列表，建议走 headless 浏览器
status_legend.access_failed: 最近一次主动访问失败 (HTTP 非 2xx/3xx)，需要重试或更换入口
status_legend.suspected_irrelevant: URL 存在但与本任务方向 (管理科学/工程) 弱相关，需要人工判断
status_legend.requires_manual_confirmation: 智能体基于训练知识给出候选 URL，未做实际 HTTP 校验，需要在首次抓取时人工或自动复核

category_legend.business_school: 商学院（含 MBA、PhD、管理类硕士）
category_legend.management_school: 管理学院（管理学独立院系）
category_legend.engineering_management: 工程管理 / 技术管理
category_legend.operations_research: 运筹学 / 优化 / 决策科学
category_legend.information_systems: 管理信息系统 / 信息系统
category_legend.industrial_engineering: 工业工程 / 运筹与系统工程
category_legend.decision_science: 决策科学 / 行为决策
category_legend.business_analytics: 商业分析 / 量化管理
category_legend.public_policy: 公共政策 / 公共管理

meta.notes: v2.2 在 v2.1 基础上（BRA-15 校准）：(1) schema 升级到 v1.1，新增可选字段 list_url_hint（显式教师列表页 URL hint，爬虫会先于常见后缀拼接探测），先在 eth-dmtec 与 tsinghua-sem 两条落地；schema.md 已同步更新。(2) tsinghua-dmei 的 url=https://www.imse.tsinghua.edu.cn/ 在 BRA-7.1 真实网络冒烟中触发 DNS 错误，为避免污染 fetcher failure 计数，将 status 改为 requires_manual_confirmation（不再走 active 入口探测），并补充 notes 说明后续维护路径；department_id 与 url 字段本身保留，方便维护者基于此条目人工维护。(3) 其余 102 条数据与 v2.1 完全一致。v2.1 的 business_analytics 补齐与 required_category_coverage 校验保留。 v2.2 (BRA-15 followup): 校准 stale list_url_hint 到当前 200 路径。

entries.department_name_en: MIT Center for Transportation & Logistics (CTL)
entries.notes: MIT 供应链/物流方向旗舰中心，含 SCM 硕士项目；研究方向覆盖供应链优化、运筹。Faculty: https://ctl.mit.edu/about/people

entries.department_name_en: MIT Institute for Data, Systems, and Society (IDSS) - Center for Computational Marketing
entries.notes: IDSS 横跨运筹、统计与社会科学，含 Center for Computational Marketing / Center for Statistics and Data Science；教师页: https://idss.mit.edu/people/

entries.department_name_en: MIT Operations Research Center (ORC)
entries.notes: MIT 工程学院下的运筹中心，是 MIT 在 OR/优化/随机方向的核心组织。教师与博士: https://orc.mit.edu/people

entries.department_name_en: MIT Sloan School of Management
entries.notes: Sloan 是 MIT 的管理学院；含 MBA、Master of Finance、Master of Business Analytics、PhD。研究方向涵盖运筹、行为决策、Sloan 工业经济（已合入）。教师入口: https://mitsloan.mit.edu/faculty

entries.department_name_en: MIT Master of Business Analytics (MBAn) program
entries.notes: MIT Sloan 下的 12 个月 Business Analytics 硕士；方向含 analytics、机器学习、运筹；与 Sloan 师资高度重合但项目页更便于直接抓 program 教学与教师。

entries.department_name_en: Imperial College Business School
entries.notes: 含 MBA、MSc Business Analytics、MSc Finance、PhD。研究方向覆盖金融、运营、运筹与商业分析。Faculty: https://www.imperial.ac.uk/business-school/people/

entries.department_name_en: Imperial MSc Business Analytics
entries.notes: Imperial College Business School 的 MSc Business Analytics 项目；含 statistics、OR、machine learning for business 方向。

entries.department_name_en: Stanford Graduate School of Business
entries.notes: Stanford GSB 含 MBA、MSx、PhD；研究含经济分析与政策、运营/信息/技术、组织行为。Faculty: https://www.gsb.stanford.edu/faculty-research/faculty

entries.department_name_en: Stanford Institute for Computational and Mathematical Engineering (ICME)
entries.notes: ICME 是工程学院的交叉中心，含计算数学/数据科学/优化方向教师；与 MS&E 互补。

entries.department_name_en: Stanford Department of Management Science and Engineering
entries.notes: MS&E 是管理科学与工程的代表性系；含运筹、决策分析、概率与随机系统、SCM、金融与会计工程。Faculty: https://msande.stanford.edu/people/faculty

entries.department_name_en: Oxford Blavatnik School of Government
entries.notes: 公共政策/政府研究方向，Oxford 旗舰。含 MPP、PhD、Research 等。Faculty: https://www.bsg.ox.ac.uk/people

entries.department_name_en: Oxford Saïd Business School
entries.notes: 含 MBA、MSc in Management / Finance / Financial Economics、PhD。Faculty: https://www.sbs.ox.ac.uk/research/research-faculty

entries.department_name_en: Harvard Business School (HBS)
entries.notes: HBS 含 MBA、Doctoral Programs (DBA)、Master of Business Analytics。研究含会计与管理、决策科学、运营管理、技术与运营管理。Faculty: https://www.hbs.edu/leadership/faculty-and-research

entries.department_name_en: Harvard Kennedy School (HKS)
entries.notes: HKS 是全球公共政策标杆，含 MPP、MPA、PhD，研究含政策分析、经济发展。Faculty: https://www.hks.harvard.edu/faculty

entries.department_name_en: Cambridge Centre for Public Policy (CPP)
entries.notes: Cambridge 的公共政策交叉研究组织，挂靠在 Judge 与人文社科院之间。MPhil in Public Policy 项目。

entries.department_name_en: Cambridge Judge Business School
entries.notes: 含 MBA、MPhil in Management / Finance / Technology Policy、PhD。Faculty: https://www.jbs.cam.ac.uk/people/research-faculty/

entries.department_name_en: ETH Zurich Department of Management, Technology, and Economics (D-MTEC)
entries.notes: D-MTEC 含管理、运筹、系统工程、风险与安全、健康 TIK。Chair of Operations Research: https://or.ethz.ch/。BRA-15 v2.2 校准：list_url_hint 改指向当前 200 路径 https://mtec.ethz.ch/people.html（旧 hint /people/people.html 已 404；目标页是 XHR/JS 渲染，SSR-only fetcher 仅能 200 探测，profile 落地属 JS 渲染范围、超出 BRA-11 父 issue 边界）。

entries.department_name_en: UCL School of Management
entries.notes: 含 MSc Management / Business Analytics / Finance、PhD。研究含商业分析、运营与供应链、创业与创新。Faculty: https://www.ucl.ac.uk/management/people

entries.department_name_en: Caltech Computing and Mathematical Sciences (CMS)
entries.notes: CMS 含控制与决策、机器学习、运筹学方向少量教师 (Prof. John Doyle 等) 可作为 IE/OR/decision 候补，仍不构成本任务的主要采集源。

entries.department_name_en: Caltech Division of Engineering and Applied Science (EAS) — relevant groups
entries.notes: Caltech 无独立商学院或管理学院。EAS 下含 Control and Dynamical Systems 与 Computing and Mathematical Sciences，含少量与运筹/决策交叉的教师。如要采集管理/工程管理方向，建议改从 JPL/Caltech CMS 招聘页或 Simons Institute 等替代；当前条目保留为占位。

entries.department_name_en: Chicago Booth School of Business
entries.notes: Booth 含 MBA、PhD、Master in Business Analytics、Executive MBA。研究方向含经济学、统计、决策科学、运营管理。Faculty: https://www.chicagobooth.edu/faculty

entries.department_name_en: Chicago Booth Center for Decision Research (CDR)
entries.notes: CDR 是 Booth 下的行为决策科学中心，研究判断与决策心理学、行为经济学。Faculty & Researchers: https://www.cdr.uchicago.edu/people

entries.department_name_en: University of Chicago Harris School of Public Policy
entries.notes: Harris 是 Chicago 公共政策学院，含 MPP、MA、PhD。Faculty: https://harris.uchicago.edu/people

entries.department_name_en: Penn Lauder Institute for International Management
entries.notes: Lauder 是 Wharton + 文理学院的国际管理联合项目；方向含跨文化管理。

entries.department_name_en: The Wharton School
entries.notes: Wharton 含 MBA、MS / MBI、PhD；研究方向涵盖 11 个系 (含 OID/Operations, Information and Decisions)。Faculty: https://faculty.wharton.upenn.edu/

entries.department_name_en: Cornell Institute for Public Affairs (CIPA)
entries.notes: CIPA 是 Cornell 公共政策方向，含 MPA、PhD。研究含环境与发展政策。

entries.department_name_en: Cornell SC Johnson College of Business
entries.notes: 下设 Johnson (MBA/PhD)、Dyson (应用经济与管理)、SHA (酒店管理)。教师索引: https://business.cornell.edu/people/faculty-research

entries.department_name_en: Cornell Operations Research and Information Engineering (ORIE)
entries.notes: ORIE 是 Cornell 工程学院的代表性 IE/OR 系，含运筹、信息工程、机器学习、数据科学。Faculty: https://www.orie.cornell.edu/people/faculty

entries.department_name_en: Melbourne Business School (MBS)
entries.notes: MBS 与墨尔本大学 Faculty of Business and Economics 关联紧密；同时记录 Faculty of Business and Economics 入口 https://fbe.unimelb.edu.au/ 作为补充。

entries.department_name_en: Berkeley Goldman School of Public Policy (GSPP)
entries.notes: Berkeley 公共政策学院，含 MPP、PhD。研究含政策分析、能源/环境/发展政策。

entries.department_name_en: Berkeley Haas School of Business
entries.notes: Haas 含 MBA、PhD、Master of Financial Engineering、Master of Business Analytics。Faculty: https://haas.berkeley.edu/faculty/

entries.department_name_en: Berkeley Industrial Engineering & Operations Research (IEOR)
entries.notes: IEOR 隶属 Berkeley 工程学院，是 IE/OR 与管理工程的传统强系。Faculty: https://ieor.berkeley.edu/people/

entries.department_name_en: Yale Jackson School of Global Affairs
entries.notes: Yale 的全球事务学院，含 MIPP、PhD、Global Affairs 证书项目。

entries.department_name_en: Yale School of Management (SOM)
entries.notes: SOM 含 MBA、PhD、Master of Business Analytics、Master of Management Studies。Faculty: https://som.yale.edu/faculty-research

entries.department_name_en: Peking University Guanghua School of Management
entries.notes: 光华管理学院在国内管理学科排名稳居前列，含本科、硕士、博士、MBA、EMBA。教师中文入口: https://www.gsm.pku.edu.cn/faculty/，英文版: https://en.gsm.pku.edu.cn/faculty/index.htm

entries.department_name_en: Peking University School of Government (政府管理学院)
entries.notes: 北京大学政府管理学院，含政治学、行政管理、公共政策。

entries.department_name_en: Princeton Operations Research and Financial Engineering (ORFE)
entries.notes: ORFE 是 Princeton 工程学院下的运筹与金融工程系，与管理科学/决策方向紧密相关。Faculty: https://orfe.princeton.edu/people/faculty

entries.department_name_en: Princeton School of Public and International Affairs (SPIA)
entries.notes: SPIA 是公共政策方向的主要入口；含 MPA、PhD 公共事务。Faculty: https://spia.princeton.edu/people

entries.school_name_en: University of New South Wales (UNSW Sydney)
entries.department_name_en: UNSW Business School
entries.notes: UNSW 商学院含精算、银行与金融、会计、商业分析与信息系统、管理、运营与风险管理、市场营销。Faculty: https://www.unsw.edu.au/business/our-people

entries.department_name_en: Munk School of Global Affairs & Public Policy (U of T)
entries.notes: Toronto 的全球事务与公共政策学院，含 MPP、PhD。研究含政策、治理。

entries.department_name_en: Rotman School of Management
entries.notes: Rotman 含 MBA、PhD、Master of Financial Risk Management、Master of Business Analytics。Faculty: https://www.rotman.utoronto.ca/faculty-and-research/faculty

entries.department_name_en: Tsinghua Department of Management Science and Engineering (MSE / 工业工程系)
entries.notes: 管理科学与工程是清华一级学科，工业工程系是承载单位之一；含运筹、决策、物流与供应链、信息系统。BRA-15 (v2.2)：url=https://www.imse.tsinghua.edu.cn/ 在 BRA-7.1 真实网络冒烟中触发 DNS 错误（enotfound www.imse.tsinghua.edu.cn）。为避免污染 fetcher failure 计数、便于人工维护者与 fetcher failure 区分，status 改为 requires_manual_confirmation（active 入口探测会跳过本条，写入 audit skipped 行而非 no_list_page failure）。department_id 与 url 保留，待维护者确认正确入口（如校级目录 https://www.tsinghua.edu.cn/info/1183/7291.htm 或经工业工程系实际站点）后回写。

entries.department_name_en: Tsinghua School of Economics and Management (SEM)
entries.notes: 清华大学经济管理学院，含本科、博士、MBA、EMBA。教师中文: https://www.sem.tsinghua.edu.cn/szll/jzg.htm。BRA-15 v2.2 校准：list_url_hint 改指向当前 200 路径 https://www.sem.tsinghua.edu.cn/en/Faculty/Faculty/Current_Faculty.htm（旧 hint /en/People/Faculty.htm 已 404；当前英文教师页仍为 Tsinghua VSB 动态加载，SSR-only fetcher 0 profile 属 JS 渲染范围、超出 BRA-11 父 issue 边界）。

entries.department_name_en: Tsinghua School of Public Policy & Management (SPPM)
entries.notes: 清华大学公共管理学院，公共管理一级学科。含 MPA、MPP、PhD、IMPA。

entries.department_name_en: University of Michigan Industrial and Operations Engineering (IOE)
entries.notes: IOE 是工程学院的工业与运营工程系，含运筹、人因、随机系统、运筹分析。Faculty: https://ioe.engin.umich.edu/people

entries.department_name_en: Michigan Ross School of Business
entries.notes: Ross 含 MBA、MS、PhD、Master of Business Analytics、Master of Supply Chain Management。Faculty: https://michiganross.umich.edu/faculty-research

entries.department_name_en: NUS Business School
entries.notes: NUS 商学院含 MBA、PhD、Master of Business Analytics、MSc in Business Analytics (NUS-ISS 联培)。Faculty: https://bschool.nus.edu.sg/faculty-research/faculty/

entries.department_name_en: NUS School of Computing (SoC) — Information Systems programme
entries.notes: NUS SoC 下的 IS 方向（Bachelor/Master of Computing in Information Systems）与商学院互补；可一并抓取 IS 教师。

entries.department_name_en: NUS Department of Industrial Systems Engineering and Management (ISE)
entries.notes: IEM 属 NUS 工程学院，含运筹/统计/数据分析/工业工程/管理信息系统。

entries.department_name_en: NUS Lee Kuan Yew School of Public Policy (LKYSPP)
entries.notes: LKYSPP 是 NUS 公共政策学院，含 MPP、MPA、PhD。

entries.department_name_en: Johns Hopkins Carey Business School
entries.notes: Carey 含 MBA、MS in Business Analytics / Finance / Information Systems、PhD。Faculty: https://carey.jhu.edu/faculty-research

entries.department_name_en: Johns Hopkins School of Advanced International Studies (SAIS)
entries.notes: JHU SAIS 是国际关系与公共政策的旗舰学院，含 MIPP、MA、PhD，分布于 DC/欧洲/博洛尼亚校区。

entries.department_name_en: University of Edinburgh Business School
entries.notes: 含 MBA、MSc in Management / Business Analytics、PhD。Faculty: https://www.business-school.ed.ac.uk/research/our-researchers

entries.department_name_en: Columbia Business School
entries.notes: CBS 含 MBA、PhD、MS in Business Analytics / Financial Economics。Faculty: https://www8.gsb.columbia.edu/faculty-research/faculty

entries.department_name_en: Columbia Department of Industrial Engineering and Operations Research (IEOR)
entries.notes: IEOR 是哥伦比亚工程学院的代表性系，含运筹、OR/Stats/DA、运筹与金融工程方向。

entries.department_name_en: Columbia School of International and Public Affairs (SIPA)
entries.notes: SIPA 是 Columbia 公共政策/国际事务学院，含 MPA、MPP、PhD。

entries.department_name_en: EPFL College of Management of Technology (CDM)
entries.notes: CDM 是 EPFL 的管理学院，含金融工程、管理科学、运营、技术与创业。Faculty: https://cdm.epfl.ch/people/

entries.department_name_en: King's Business School
entries.notes: KBS 含 MSc in Management / Digital Marketing / Business Analytics、PhD。Faculty 入口: https://www.kcl.ac.uk/business/people

entries.department_name_en: HKU Business School
entries.notes: HKUBS 含 MBA、PhD、Master of Economics、Master of Business Analytics、Master of Finance。Faculty: https://www.hkubs.hku.hk/people

entries.department_name_en: HKU Department of Politics and Public Administration
entries.notes: HKU 政治与公共行政学系是公共政策/治理方向主要院系。

entries.department_name_en: The University of Tokyo Graduate School of Public Policy (GraSPP)
entries.notes: 东京大学公共政策大学院，是管理/政策/经济交叉方向。

entries.department_name_en: The University of Tokyo Graduate School of Economics
entries.notes: 东京大学经济学研究科是经济与管理方向主要入口；同时记录工学部系统创成学 / 决策分析方向的入口 https://www.s.t.u-tokyo.ac.jp/en/ 作为补充。

entries.department_name_en: Northwestern McCormick School of Engineering — IEMS (Industrial Engineering & Management Sciences)
entries.notes: IEMS 是 McCormick 工程学院下的代表性 IE/MS 系，含运筹、随机系统、决策科学、供应链。

entries.department_name_en: Kellogg School of Management
entries.notes: Kellogg 含 MBA、PhD、MS in Business Analytics、Master in Management。Faculty: https://www.kellogg.northwestern.edu/faculty

entries.department_name_en: UCLA Anderson School of Management
entries.notes: Anderson 含 MBA、PhD、Master of Business Analytics / Financial Engineering。Faculty: https://www.anderson.ucla.edu/faculty-and-research

entries.department_name_en: UCLA Anderson Master of Quantitative Economics (MQE)
entries.notes: Anderson MQE 是 UCLA 量化分析方向；与 MSBA 略有差异（更偏 econ/quant），但仍归 business_analytics 方向类别。

entries.department_name_en: UCLA Luskin School of Public Affairs
entries.notes: Luskin 含 MPP、PhD、Social Welfare、Urban Planning。Faculty: https://luskin.ucla.edu/people

entries.department_name_en: Fudan University School of Management (FDSM)
entries.notes: 复旦大学管理学院，含本科、硕士、博士、MBA、EMBA、Master of Business Analytics。中文教师: https://www.fdsm.fudan.edu.cn/teachers/，英文: https://www.fdsm.fudan.edu.cn/en/faculty.htm

entries.department_name_en: Fudan School of Data Science (大数据学院)
entries.notes: 复旦大学大数据学院含统计/数据科学方向，可与 FDSM 互补。

entries.department_name_en: NYU Center for Data Science (CDS)
entries.notes: 与 Stern/MSDS 联培的数据科学中心；含 data science 方向教师与研究。People: https://cds.nyu.edu/people/

entries.department_name_en: NYU Stern School of Business
entries.notes: Stern 含 MBA、PhD、MS in Business Analytics / Data Science & Business Statistics (与 Center for Data Science 联培)。Faculty: https://www.stern.nyu.edu/faculty-research

entries.department_name_en: NYU Wagner School of Public Service
entries.notes: Wagner 含 MPA、MPP、MHA、PhD。Faculty: https://wagner.nyu.edu/about/people

entries.department_name_en: Alliance Manchester Business School
entries.notes: Alliance MBS 是英国最大的商学院之一，含 MBA、MSc、PhD。Faculty: https://www.alliancembs.manchester.ac.uk/about/people/

entries.school_name_en: London School of Economics and Political Science (LSE)
entries.department_name_en: LSE Department of Management
entries.notes: LSE 管理系与统计系合作开设 MSc in Management / Data Science / Operations Research & Analytics。Faculty: https://www.lse.ac.uk/management/people

entries.school_name_en: London School of Economics and Political Science (LSE)
entries.department_name_en: LSE School of Public Policy
entries.notes: LSE 的公共政策学院，含 MPA、MPP、PhD。

entries.school_name_en: London School of Economics and Political Science (LSE)
entries.department_name_en: LSE Department of Statistics (with OR & Analytics programmes)
entries.notes: LSE 统计系与 OR/Analytics 项目所在地；研究含运筹、统计学习。

entries.department_name_en: The University of Sydney Business School
entries.notes: 含 MBA、PhD、Master of Business Analytics。Faculty: https://www.sydney.edu.au/business/our-research/researchers

entries.department_name_en: ANU College of Business and Economics (CBE)
entries.notes: 下设 Research School of Management、ANU College of Business and Economics，含会计、精算、商业分析、统计与运筹。Faculty: https://cbe.anu.edu.au/our-people

entries.department_name_en: ANU School of Government (formerly ANU Crawford School)
entries.notes: ANU 公共政策/政府学院 (Crawford School of Public Policy)，含 MPP、PhD。M Crawford 前身。

entries.department_name_en: Seoul National University College of Business Administration
entries.notes: 首尔大学商学院含 BA、MS、PhD、MBA；研究覆盖财务、运营、IS、IR。英文教师: https://cba.snu.ac.kr/en/people/faculty

entries.department_name_en: Seoul National University Graduate School of Public Administration
entries.notes: 首尔大学行政大学院含公共管理硕士与博士。

entries.department_name_en: UQ Business School
entries.notes: UQ 商学院是澳八大之一，含 MBA、Master of Business Analytics。Faculty: https://business.uq.edu.au/research/researchers

entries.department_name_en: University of Bristol Business School
entries.notes: Bristol 商学院含 MSc Management / Accounting & Finance / Business Analytics、PhD。Faculty: https://www.bristol.ac.uk/business-school/people/

entries.school_name_en: The University of Texas at Austin
entries.department_name_en: McCombs IROM — Information, Risk, and Operations Management
entries.notes: IROM 是 McCombs 下运营管理与信息系统系；含运筹、IT 风险、运营管理。

entries.school_name_en: The University of Texas at Austin
entries.department_name_en: UT Austin LBJ School of Public Affairs
entries.notes: LBJ School 是 UT Austin 公共政策学院，含 MPA、MPP、PhD。

entries.school_name_en: The University of Texas at Austin
entries.department_name_en: McCombs School of Business
entries.notes: McCombs 含 MBA、PhD、MS in Business Analytics、MSc in Finance。Faculty: https://www.mccombs.utexas.edu/faculty-and-research

entries.school_name_en: The University of Texas at Austin
entries.department_name_en: McCombs Master of Science in Business Analytics (MSBA)
entries.notes: McCombs MSBA 项目；含 AI/ML、Marketing Analytics、Supply Chain Analytics；教师多与 IROM 重合。

entries.department_name_en: Amsterdam Business School (ABS)
entries.notes: ABS 与阿姆斯特丹经济与商业学院 (ASE) 互补；含 MSc in Business Analytics / Finance。Faculty: https://abs.uva.nl/research/faculty

entries.department_name_en: Amsterdam School of Economics (ASE)
entries.notes: ASE 是 UvA 的经济与商业经济学系，与 ABS 互补；含 MSc Economics / Business Economics。

entries.department_name_en: Zhejiang University School of Management (管院)
entries.notes: 浙江大学管理学院是管理学院；含 MBA、EMBA、MPAcc、PhD。英文: https://www.som.zju.edu.cn/en/

entries.department_name_en: Zhejiang University School of Public Affairs (公管学院)
entries.notes: 浙江大学公共管理学院，含 MPA、MPP、PhD。

entries.department_name_en: University of Washington Daniel J. Evans School of Public Policy & Governance
entries.notes: Evans School 是 UW 的公共政策学院，含 MPA、MPP、PhD。

entries.department_name_en: Michael G. Foster School of Business
entries.notes: Foster 含 MBA、MS in Business Analytics / Supply Chain Management、PhD。Faculty: https://foster.uw.edu/faculty-research

entries.school_name_en: The Chinese University of Hong Kong (CUHK)
entries.department_name_en: CUHK Business School
entries.notes: CUHK 商学院含 MBA、MSc in Business Analytics、PhD。Faculty: https://www.bschool.cuhk.edu.hk/faculty-and-research/

entries.school_name_en: The Chinese University of Hong Kong (CUHK)
entries.department_name_en: CUHK Department of Systems Engineering and Engineering Management (SEEM)
entries.notes: SEEM 是系统工程与管理相关方向，是管理科学与工程对应的工科系所之一。Faculty: https://www.se.cuhk.edu.hk/en/people

entries.department_name_en: Université Paris-Dauphine, PSL — Management & Organisations
entries.notes: Dauphine 是 PSL 下管理/组织研究单位，含 MSc in Management / Business Analytics、PhD。

entries.department_name_en: Mines Paris – PSL, Engineering Management & Industrial Engineering
entries.notes: Mines Paris PSL 是 PSL 下工程管理/工业工程传统强校，含 Centre de Gestion Scientifique (运筹/管理科学)。

entries.department_name_en: Paris School of Economics (PSE) — affiliated with Université PSL
entries.notes: PSE 是 PSL 体系下核心经济研究机构；含决策与行为经济学、运筹、公共政策方向教师。PSL 内另设 Dauphine (https://dauphine.psl.eu/) 作为管理与组织研究补充。

entries.department_name_en: Monash Business School
entries.notes: Monash 商学院含 Monash Business School、MDSI。Faculty: https://www.monash.edu/business/research/researchers

entries.department_name_en: Carnegie Mellon Heinz College of Information Systems and Public Policy
entries.notes: Heinz College 信息系统/公共政策方向，含 MISM、MSPP、PhD。Faculty: https://www.heinz.cmu.edu/faculty-research

entries.department_name_en: Tepper School of Business
entries.notes: Tepper 是 CMU 的管理学院，运筹/决策/信息系统方向强势；含 MBA、PhD、MS in Business Analytics / Computational Finance。Faculty: https://www.cmu.edu/tepper/faculty-and-research

entries.department_name_en: Tepper Master of Science in Business Analytics (MSBA)
entries.notes: Tepper MSBA 是 CMU 在 business analytics 方向的核心项目；含 AI for Business、Decision Analysis；可与 Heinz CDS 形成互补视图。

entries.department_name_en: Sauder School of Business
entries.notes: Sauder 含 MBA、PhD、MSc in Business Analytics。Faculty: https://www.sauder.ubc.ca/People

entries.department_name_en: UBC School of Information (iSchool)
entries.notes: UBC iSchool 是信息系统/信息科学方向学院，含 MLIS、MSc in Information。

entries.school_name_en: Ludwig Maximilian University of Munich (LMU Munich)
entries.department_name_en: LMU Munich School of Management
entries.notes: LMU School of Management 是 LMU 的管理学独立学院，含 Institute of Information Systems & Marketing / Institute of Strategic Management / 等。Faculty: https://www.mgmt.uni-muenchen.de/people/index.html
